# MCSS Login Form Component

## HTML Structure

```html
<!-- Login Form Molecule -->
<form 
  class="c-login-form" 
  typeof="mcs:Component" 
  property="mcs:taxonomyLevel" content="mcs:Molecule"
  property="mcs:purpose" content="User authentication form with email and password fields"
  data-mcs-interaction-type="submission"
  data-mcs-consequence="Authenticates user credentials"
  data-mcs-triggers-event="login:submit"
  data-state="default"
>
